DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-10-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Emilie M. Calhoun, Esq., Fiduciary Law Attorneys, T:415.759.8755, for defendants/moving party;
John Priatko, T:724.261.7047, plaintiff appearing on his own behalf by Court Call.

John Priatko requests for continuance of the hearing for reasons stated on the record. The Court denies plaintiff's request.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, DEFENDANTs GORDON PRIATKO and PHYLLIS GARDNER's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED on the ground that another action pending. Prevailing party to prepare a proposed order and submit it in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter CSR#6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-10-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Emilie M. Calhoun, Esq., Fiduciary Law Attorneys, T:415.759.8755, for defendants/moving party;
John Priatko, T:724.261.7047, plaintiff appearing on his own behalf by Court Call.

John Priatko requests for continuance of the hearing for reasons stated on the record. The Court denies plaintiff's request.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, DEFENDANTS GORDON PRIATKO and PHYLLIS GARDNER's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is off calendar.
